title: Silver 10-Piece Stainless Steel Fork Set for Dessert and Fruit - Dishwasher Safe, Perfect for Home Kitchen and Restaurant
features: 【Simple & Classic Looking】No complicated handle decoration, elegant and simple design favored by most people. The classic design cutlery forks would match well with your existing cutlery and elevate your everyday meals into a fine dining experience.

【High-Quality Stainless Steel Material】 The cake fork is made of food-grade stainless steel, which has excellent durability and corrosion resistance. The stainless steel material is not only strong and durable, but also not easy to deform, ensuring that the spoon remains bright and new for a long time.

【Ergonomic Design】The handle of the forks cutlery has a soft arc, which perfectly matches the grip position of your hand, allowing you to grasp the dinner fork very easily, conveniently and effortlessly.

【Smooth and Easy to Clean】 The surface of the dessert fork is finely mirror polished, showing a bright luster and a smooth and delicate feel. This polishing process not only enhances the beauty of the spoon, but also makes the surface of the spoon smoother and less likely to retain food residues.

【Multi-Multipurpose Cutlery Forks】The stainless steel fork set is multipurpose and perfect for salads, fruits, cakes, fish, pies and other foods. Hence it is one of the must-have forks cutlery in restaurants, bistros, cafes, roadside cottages and hotels.
description: Product Description Product Description Perfect Design The design is simple and elegant, can match various tableware, convenient for family gatherings and hotel buffet as well as weddings, festivals, parties and other occasions. High Quality Material Made of high-quality stainless steel, it has undergone multiple polishing treatments to make it as bright as a mirror, the edges are very smooth and burr-free after good polishing and grinding, and will not scratch your mouth; Multiple Uses This stainless steel pastry fork is suitable for home, wedding, restaurant, hotel, cafe, suitable for eating cakes, appetizers, fruits, etc.
